flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at UCNJ Union College of Union County NJ rose 33% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.3k → $15.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at UCNJ Union College of Union County NJ fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at UCNJ Union College of Union County NJ fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.6k → $9.5k).
